title: rhus aromatica subsp. flabelliformis
intro: Rhus aromatica subsp. flabelliformis, also known as the sweet sumac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sweet sumac include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving digestive health and lowering blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
